channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly posting, 9th April
item.description:
Resident has reported flyposting outside number 15 Anerley Hill. please can ths be cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car, 9th April
item.description:
Untaxed car in street. Can see someone else reported it but you closed the enquiry due to the car 'not being there' but it is still there so you may have not checked the right location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing public bin, 9th April
item.description:
The bin is overflowing with litter and dog bags.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mountain of rubbish from kebab shop, 9th April
item.description:
I would like to make a complaint about the bins outside Forest Hill Kebab at 102 Forest Hill Road SE22 0RS. They are always overflowing and have been even worse over the last week now. Foxes every night scavage around and on the bins ripping them open and also a rat has now been seen among the mountain of rubbish. It is only getting worse and with the warmer weather the smell is getting worse too. It is disgusting walking past there everyday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 108, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in road, 9th April
item.description:
Dead fox in road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 9th April
item.description:
Mattress and other rubbish dumped outside 252 Mottingham Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly posting, 9th April
item.description:
Fly posting taken place outside number 1 Anerley Hill. Please can this be cleared.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anerley Hill, Crystal Palace, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned trolly, 9th April
item.description:
There is an abandoned trolly on the corner of Crossmead. It needs removing.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossmead, Eltham

item.title: Flyposting, 9th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 08/04/26 18:41 Fly-posting Lat/Long - 51.4179946, -0.0802354 what3words - gates.tile.monkey Nearest address - 63A, Church Road, Anerley, London, SE19 2TE flyposting Reference - 5473902 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 08/04/2026 18:40 flyposting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Church Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plastic bag in a tree, 9th April
item.description:
Right next to your office. Do you mind cleaning it?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fire Station Square, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More Potholes, 9th April
item.description:
Email received by CSC inbox 08/04/26 17:29 Pothole Lat/Long - 51.3868182, 0.0637429 what3words - scar.dated.loses Nearest address - 5 Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Orpington, BR5 1AA A crack and a pothole have appeared and are getting deeper. Would appreciate your attendance and repair. Thank you for your efforts. Reference - 5473699 Map link - open Google map Report history - Status: Received 08/04/2026 17:28 A crack and a pothole have appeared and are getting deeper. Would appreciate your attendance and repair. Thank you for your efforts.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chesham Avenue, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead tree needs replacing, 9th April
item.description:
Half the tree broke in a storm, everything left alive was chopped off by the council last year.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Malmains Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish as always, 9th April
item.description:
Needs cleaning

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van is blocking the cycle lane, 9th April
item.description:
This van has been parked outside my house for 2 weeks now. It’s on the cycle lane and also makes it hard for me to come out of my driveway as it blocks the view. I’ve already had one accident coming out of my driveway as the road is very busy. Bellegrove Road is becoming a car park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 9th April
item.description:
This particular rubbish has been there for about a week now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlton Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London

item.description:

item.title: More fly tipping from old Nike building, 9th April
item.description:
Have filed multiple reports in this area, multiple instances of boxes and rubbish from new occupants of old Nike building on morning lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mehetabel Road, Hackney, London
